issues.suggestion: Remove localStorage access. This is server-side code.

issues.issue: File contains window reference in API route

issues.issue: new Date() in JSX render - causes hydration mismatch
issues.suggestion: Use useState with lazy initialization or pass defaultDate as prop from server

issues.issue: new Date() called in render body for isOverdue calculation
issues.suggestion: Move to useMemo or useState with lazy initialization

issues.suggestion: Move to useMemo or useEffect with state

issues.issue: new Date() called in render body (_currentTime variable)
issues.suggestion: If unused, remove. If needed for display, use useState lazy init or suppressHydrationWarning

issues.issue: new Date() called in hook - acceptable for time tracking but updates every minute
issues.suggestion: This is acceptable as the hook intentionally updates every minute via interval

issues.issue: new Date() called in getDefaultTemplates() - used for default data only
issues.suggestion: This is acceptable as it's only used for generating default template data, not for display
